product/src/main/java/com/yas/product/Pr.general_idea: Explicitly enable configuration properties binding for ServiceUrlConfig to ensure type-safe configuration access in the Spring Boot application.

product/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3 ecosystem.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to replace the deprecated springfox for API documentation in Spring Boot 3.
Add spring-boot-starter-actuator for production-ready features like health checks and metrics.
Add spring-boot-starter-oauth2-resource-server to handle OAuth2 security requirements.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation for bean validation support.
Add spring-boot-starter-webflux for reactive web support.
Add spring-boot-devtools for faster development cycle.
Add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa for JPA data access.
Add PostgreSQL driver for database connectivity.
Add Lombok to reduce boilerplate code.
Add H2 in-memory database for testing purposes.
Add spring-boot-starter-aop for aspect-oriented programming support.
Add Apache Commons Collections4 for utility collection classes.
Add Liquibase core for database schema migration management.
Add internal saga framework dependency for distributed transaction management.
Add logstash-logback-encoder for structured logging output.
Add OpenTelemetry Logback MDC integration for observability.
Add Spring Cloud dependencies BOM for version management of cloud components.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin to use Lombok as an annotation processor.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Maven target directory to gitignore to exclude build artifacts.
Add IntelliJ IDEA configuration files to gitignore.
Add Eclipse project metadata files to gitignore.
Add VS Code configuration folder to gitignore.
